description: Employee is a UAE national (is_emirati=true). UAE nationals in the private sector are covered by GPSSA (General Pension and Social Security Authority) — they receive pension, not MOHRE gratuity. Worker must FLAG this and route to HR, not compute a lump-sum gratuity.
law_reference: Federal Law No. 7/1999 (GPSSA) + Federal Decree-Law 33/2021 exclusion for GPSSA members

expected.reason: UAE national — covered by GPSSA pension scheme, not MOHRE gratuity
expected.action_required: Route to HR for GPSSA entitlement calculation
expected.invariant: worker must NOT silently compute a MOHRE lump-sum for a GPSSA member

code_gap: Current code has no is_emirati guard — would compute MOHRE gratuity for a UAE national. This test will FAIL until the guard is added.
